qa_pairs.question: What are the default storage quotas and backup policies for the Home, Scratch, Project, and Nearline filesystems on the Nibi cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Nibi cluster, the default quotas are 50 GB and 500K files for Home space (per user), 20 TB hard / 1 TB soft and 1M files for Scratch space (per user), 1 TB and 500K files for Project space (per group), and 10 TB and 5000 files for Nearline space (per group). Home, Project, and Nearline spaces are backed up, whereas Scratch space is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What are the default storage quotas and purging policies for the Home, Scratch, Project, and Nearline filesystems on the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: For the Narval and Rorqual clusters, default quotas are 50 GB and 500K files for Home space (per user), 20 TB and 1M files for Scratch space (per user), 1 TB and 500K files for Project space (per group), and 1 TB and 5000 files for Nearline space (per group). Files older than 60 days in Scratch space are purged, while Home, Project, and Nearline spaces are not purged.

qa_pairs.question: How can users request larger quotas for project and nearline spaces on clusters such as Nibi, Narval, and Rorqual?
qa_pairs.answer: Since April 1, 2024, new Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies allow for larger quotas for project and nearline spaces. For quota changes exceeding those permitted by RAS, users must apply to the annual Resource Allocation Competition.
